description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style knife with a pronounced, angular blade that features a straight edge and a sharply sloped tip. The blade is matte black, giving it a stealthy appearance, and includes a small cutout near the base, possibly for weight reduction or as a design element. The handle is ergonomically contoured, with a dark, likely synthetic grip that appears to have subtle blue highlights and textured grooves for improved handling. The overall design is aggressive and utilitarian, suggesting it is intended for heavy-duty or survival use. There is no visible guard between the blade and handle, and the construction appears robust and solid. No decorative ornamentation or sheath is present.
description: A modern, tactical knife with a matte black, angular blade and a contoured, textured dark handle with blue highlights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the angular black blade and the contoured, textured handle with blue accents.
description_view_1: Edge-on view displaying the thinness of the blade and handle, with minimal visible detail except the straight alignment.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the blade and handle profile, with similar visibility of the blue-accented grip.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite side, again showing the slim profile and straight alignment of the knife.
attribute_handle_design: ergonomic, contoured, synthetic with textured grooves and blue highlights
